groupDefinition.name: Editor Features
groupDefinition.description: Core syntax highlighting, navigation, and basic interaction logic for source code viewing.

items.title: Monaco Editor Breakpoint Interaction
items.description: Implement Glyph Margin breakpoint operations per spec [§3.2.3](system-specification.md#323-main-content-area)
details: Listen for Monaco `onMouseDown` events (glyph margin area clicks)
Click on line number → add/remove breakpoint (red dot decoration)
Maintain local breakpoint list (`Map<filename, Set<lineNumber>>`)
Provide `getBreakpoints()` method for DAP communication use

items.title: Breakpoint DAP Synchronization
items.description: Synchronize local breakpoint changes to the DAP Server
details: Send `setBreakpoints` request on any glyph margin toggle (supports multi-file sync)
Distinguish **Verified** (red) vs. **Unverified** (gray) breakpoints in Monaco UI
Surgical update logic for `breakpoint` events to handle server-side relocation/lazy-verification
Automatic **Re-sync** of all breakpoints upon session restart or reconnect

items.title: Current Line Highlight
items.description: Implement `deltaDecorations` current execution line marking per spec [§3.2.3](system-specification.md#323-main-content-area)
details: On `stopped` event, get line number from stackTrace top frame
Use `deltaDecorations` to add background highlight on that line
Clear highlight on `continued` / `terminated`
Auto `revealLineInCenter` to scroll to current line

items.title: Command Serialization: setBreakpoints Debounce + Per-File Serialization
items.description: Implement per-file debounce and last-write-wins serialization for setBreakpoints per command-serialization.md R-CS4
details: Add debounceTime(150) on per-file breakpoint mutation stream in EditorComponent
Add setBreakpoints(path, lines) to DapSessionService with BreakpointFileState Map guard
While in-flight: store latest breakpoint list as pending (queue depth 1)
On response: dispatch pending immediately if non-empty
Distinct files proceed in parallel — no cross-file blocking
[Test] rapid same-file clicks collapse to one request; pending dispatches after in-flight resolves; two files fire independently
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/breakpoint-serialization-spec.md

items.title: Editor View State Persistence
items.description: Record and restore cursor location and selection for each file in the source view.
details: Implement Map-based view state storage in EditorComponent
Use Monaco saveViewState/restoreViewState APIs
Restore state on filename change
Link to spec: docs/archive/specs/editor-view-state-spec.md
[Test] Verify cursor and scroll position are restored when switching between files

items.title: Library Extraction: EditorComponent
items.description: Extract the Monaco-based EditorComponent into a dedicated library @taro/ui-editor to improve modularity and build isolation.
details: Create projects/ui-editor library
Relocate editor.component.ts and associated styles/templates to the library
Export component through public-api.ts
Update DebuggerComponent to consume from @taro/ui-editor
[Test] Verify app builds and editor functions (breakpoints/highlights) identically
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/editor-view-state-spec.md

items.title: Breakpoints Panel: Interactive Management UI
items.description: Implement a professional-grade Breakpoints panel with interactive checkboxes, location badges (line:column), and inline action buttons (Remove/Edit), synchronized via a centralized DapSessionService SSOT.
details: Implement high-fidelity BreakpointsComponent with Material Checkboxes and Location Badges
Add support for 'Enabled/Disabled' state in breakpoints$ SSOT
Add inline action buttons (Remove) to the breakpoint list items
Implement per-item metadata rendering (Filename, Relative Path, Line:Column truncation logic)
Refactor breakpoint state into a centralized Map in DapSessionService (SSOT)
Implement 'Jump to Source' from Breakpoints panel
[Test] Verify checkbox toggle, deletion, and reactive synchronization
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/ui-layout-inspection-panels.md
